name: OpenHands Hook Integration
description: Workflow pack that declares a hook template and README for OpenHands integration. Agentflow validates the declared paths but never reads or executes them.

hook-integration.objective: TODO: describe the OpenHands hook integration change
non_goals: Agentflow does not execute hook scripts
invariants: Hook scripts are wired up by the operator, not by Agentflow
hook-integration.rollback_plan: Revert the branch with git restore . and git checkout .

steps.action: TODO: wire the declared hook template into the OpenHands runtime

hook_templates.describe: Reference pre-commit hook; copy into the host project and wire up manually.
